Asexual reproduction is reproduction without [[sex]]. It contrasts with [[sexual reproduction]].

It normally refers to situations where an [[organism]] [[clones]] itself

[[Xenia]] is absent in it, but [[Storge]] can be in it
==See Also==
* [[sexual reproduction]]
* [[xenia]]

[[Category:Biology]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
